author: samira
text: Chroma is a friendly local vector database for prototyping semantic search and metadata filtering.

author: omar
text: FAISS supports fast exact and approximate vector search and is widely used in local RAG experiments.

author: nora
text: HNSW graph indexes often give a strong recall versus latency tradeoff for approximate nearest neighbor search.

author: samira
text: BM25 ranks documents using keyword statistics and remains essential for exact term matching.

author: liam
text: Finance reports benefit from metadata filtering by year author and category before semantic retrieval.

author: nora
text: Hybrid retrieval can merge BM25 and vector search using reciprocal rank fusion for better overall coverage.

author: nora
text: Production vector search systems should persist indexes to disk and monitor memory use as the corpus grows.

author: omar
text: IVF-style clustering speeds up search by probing only a subset of vector lists instead of the whole index.

author: samira
text: API documentation retrieval works best when section metadata and semantic search are combined.

author: liam
text: User-facing search should let people choose semantic keyword or hybrid modes depending on the task.
